from lease_runtime.coordinator import WorkerCoordinator
from lease_runtime.registry import LeaseRegistry
from lease_runtime.task_queue import TaskQueue


def test_three_connection_callbacks_may_arrive_out_of_order():
    registry = LeaseRegistry()
    tasks = TaskQueue()
    coordinator = WorkerCoordinator(registry, tasks)

    first = coordinator.connect("replica-a")
    tasks.add("first-work", 1)
    assert coordinator.assign("first-work", first)

    _, second = coordinator.replace("replica-a")
    tasks.add("second-work", 2)
    assert coordinator.assign("second-work", second)

    _, third = coordinator.replace("replica-a")
    tasks.add("third-work", 3)
    assert coordinator.assign("third-work", third)

    assert coordinator.disconnect(second) == 1
    assert registry.is_active(third)
    assert tasks.get("first-work").state == "leased"
    assert tasks.get("second-work").state == "pending"
    assert tasks.get("third-work").state == "leased"

    assert coordinator.disconnect(first) == 1
    assert registry.is_active(third)
    assert tasks.get("first-work").state == "pending"
    assert tasks.get("third-work").state == "leased"
    assert not coordinator.complete("third-work", first)
    assert not coordinator.complete("third-work", second)
    assert coordinator.complete("third-work", third)
